candidates.why: D&A-related COGS candidate, but it appears as a component within the cost-of-revenues section under the already selected total COGS row "Cost of Operating Revenue". Adding it separately would risk double counting; the row is also blank in the preview.

Explicit COGS depreciation row, but it appears within the cost-of-revenues section as a component of the already selected COGS bucket "Cost of Operating Revenue", not as a separate same-level expense outside that bucket. Conservative treatment is that it is already embedded.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the total row "Cost of Operating Revenue". The visible D&A rows are presented as cost-of-revenues components beneath that bucket, so they should not be added separately.

candidates.why: This row belongs to cost of revenues, not SG&A, so it is not relevant to the selected XSGA bucket.
This row belongs to cost of revenues, not SG&A, so it should not be added to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is "Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses". No explicit SG&A-related depreciation/amortisation row appears in the operating section excerpt, and the only D&A rows shown are clearly tied to cost of revenues.
